name: Patty Ann's Chess Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. For pastry shells, make pie pastry according to package instructions, roll out and cut rounds to fit mini-muffin cups.
3. For cream cheese pastry, mix ingredients in a medium bowl and divide equally among the muffin tins. Press into each cup with fingers.
4. Mix all filling ingredients well in a small bowl.
5. Place 1 teaspoon of filling in each pastry-lined muffin cup.
6. Bake in the preheated oven at 350 degrees F for 20 minutes, or until done.
7. Use the tip of a sharp knife to loosen around the tart edges when finished baking.
8. Remove from the oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.
9. Store in the tin box between layers of wax paper.
